title: A woman of service,strength and purpose
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - On a dusty road in the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - On a dusty road in the Northern Cape, a young girl once dreamed of becoming a teacher. Today, that same girl is Major Desiree Mawela, a lawyer, soldier, community leader and mother who serves as an inspiring force in the Oudtshoorn community.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - On a dusty road in the Northern Cape, a young girl once dreamed of becoming a teacher. Today, that same girl is Major Desiree Mawela, a lawyer, soldier, community leader and mother who serves as an inspiring force in the Oudtshoorn community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her story reminds us of the transformative power of courage, compassion and unwavering dedication.","html":"Her story reminds us of the transformative power of courage, compassion and unwavering dedication."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Desiree is currently a military legal officer at the Oudtshoorn Infantry School, where she provides legal advice on military law, handles disciplinary matters and ensures compliance with constitutional values."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her journey within the South African National Defence Force (SANDF) spans 25 years, beginning as a young recruit and rising to her current position.","html":"Her journey within the South African National Defence Force (SANDF) spans 25 years, beginning as a young recruit and rising to her current position."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Raised by a resilient single mother in a small town, Desiree was inspired by the strength and perseverance around her. \"I've always had a passion for helping and guiding others,\" she says. Initially drawn to teaching, she soon discovered a calling in law, especially in family law and advocating for vulnerable communities. After facing the harsh realities of unemployment in the civilian legal sector, she joined the SANDF and found a meaningful way to serve her country and her passion for justice.","html":"Raised by a resilient single mother in a small town, Desiree was inspired by the strength and perseverance around her. \"I've always had a passion for helping and guiding others,\" she says. Initially drawn to teaching, she soon discovered a calling in law, especially in family law and advocating for vulnerable communities. After facing the harsh realities of unemployment in the civilian legal sector, she joined the SANDF and found a meaningful way to serve her country and her passion for justice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Desiree wears many hats. She is also the chairperson of the Infantry School FC, an inclusive football club with junior, senior and growing female teams. What began as a way to support the children of military personnel has evolved into a powerful tool for community upliftment.","html":"Desiree wears many hats. She is also the chairperson of the Infantry School FC, an inclusive football club with junior, senior and growing female teams. What began as a way to support the children of military personnel has evolved into a powerful tool for community upliftment."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"Football is more than a game. It builds confidence, teaches discipline and offers young people a sense of belonging. Our players have formed a close-knit family. For many, the team is a safe space, a place of hope and healing.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Desiree is also a dedicated community volunteer. She works closely with a local centre called Place of Faith, creating a safe space for young people and women to speak openly and receive guidance without fear of judgment. She also helps lead donation drives, collecting clothes, shoes, food and sanitary products for girls who often go without.","html":"Desiree is also a dedicated community volunteer. She works closely with a local centre called Place of Faith, creating a safe space for young people and women to speak openly and receive guidance without fear of judgment. She also helps lead donation drives, collecting clothes, shoes, food and sanitary products for girls who often go without."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"These acts of kindness are personal. I was once that child in need. Giving back is how I honour my journey and help open doors for others.\"","html":"\"These acts of kindness are personal. I was once that child in need. Giving back is how I honour my journey and help open doors for others.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Desiree believes that professionals, especially women, have a responsibility to lead by example.","html":"Desiree believes that professionals, especially women, have a responsibility to lead by example."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Our professions give us platforms to advocate, to mentor, to uplift. Even small acts of service like offering legal advice or simply saying, 'I believe in you' can change someone's life.\"","html":"\"Our professions give us platforms to advocate, to mentor, to uplift. Even small acts of service like offering legal advice or simply saying, 'I believe in you' can change someone's life.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For Desiree, family is at the heart of everything.","html":"For Desiree, family is at the heart of everything."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Family time is sacred. I'm grateful that my children understand my work and support my outreach efforts. We are a team.\"","html":"\"Family time is sacred. I'm grateful that my children understand my work and support my outreach efforts. We are a team.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"To her, Women's Day is a celebration and a call to action."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It reminds me of the women who came before us and the boundaries we continue to break. We are the mothers of nations. Women's Day is a symbol of hope. Something deeply sentimental to me. We as women can keep communities and institutions together, often with grace and courage. Let us continue to serve, to lead and to inspire.\"","html":"\"It reminds me of the women who came before us and the boundaries we continue to break. We are the mothers of nations. Women's Day is a symbol of hope. Something deeply sentimental to me. We as women can keep communities and institutions together, often with grace and courage. Let us continue to serve, to lead and to inspire.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: A woman of service,strength and purpose
